case_title: GLUCK, JANOS vs. MC CLAIN, JASON AKA JASON TURTLE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLUCK, JANOS AS TO DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, JASON AKA JASON TURTLE DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED - JUDGE QUIDACHAY. JUDGMENT OF JAN-07-1999 SET ASIDE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCLAIN, JASON JURY TRIAL SET FOR NOV-17-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLUCK, JANOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, JASON AKA JASON TURTLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 191 FREDERICK ST #2, STAYED UNTIL JAN-13-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, STIPULATED- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, SETTLED PER PLTF ATTY'S TELEPHONE CALL TO CALENDAR CLERK.

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLUCK, JANOS COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-17-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT MCCLAIN, JASON
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLUCK, JANOS MC CLAIN, JASON AKA JASON TURTLE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION ENTERED HEREIN
